title: aquilegia nivalis
intro: Aquilegia nivalis, also known as the snowy columbine, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and heal wounds. The health benefits of Aquilegia nivalis include its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
